channel.title: SB Residency — Todd Shea Real Estate
channel.description: Every other week: the Santa Barbara market, three listings worth a look, and whatever's holding my attention.

item.title: Placeholder Issue Title
item.description: One-line teaser that shows on the hub page and in the RSS feed.
item.content:encoded:
Placeholder opening line. Short, confident, salty — the brand voice. One or two sentences that set up the issue.

The Nitty Gritty

Placeholder market stats section. Median price, days on market, inventory, whatever the numbers say that week.
